title: Analyze UI structure and schema
notes: Analyze the existing client directory, App.tsx, AppShell.tsx, and the auto-generated rhino.d.ts schema to understand the exact field names and types.

title: Create Blog pages
notes: Create the Blogs list page, detail page, and create/edit form page under client/src/pages/.

title: Configure routing and navigation
notes: Add the routes for the new pages in client/src/App.tsx and add navigation links in client/src/components/AppShell.tsx.

title: Verify UI integration
notes: Verify that the pages load correctly and integrate with the backend API hooks.
